summary: Completed Phase 1 frontend testing for The Fiscal Fulcrum operations portal. Tested authentication flows (admin/team/client), role-based routing, admin client management, service catalog, team workspace, client portal, and queries functionality. Identified critical Server Actions bug blocking client creation and query submission. Design system adherence verified (Inter font, teal-600 buttons, zinc-200 borders, no shadows). Mobile responsive layout working with hamburger menu.

critical_bugs.issue: Server Actions error: 'Invalid Server Actions request' when submitting new client form. Form stays on /admin/clients/new instead of redirecting to client detail page.
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Blocks admin from creating new clients
critical_bugs.error_details: Console shows repeated 'Invalid Server Actions request' errors. Likely Next.js Server Actions configuration issue or missing 'use server' directive.

critical_bugs.issue: Server Actions error: 'Invalid Server Actions request' when client submits new query. Form stays on /portal/queries instead of redirecting to query detail page.
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Blocks client from raising queries to team
critical_bugs.error_details: Same 'Invalid Server Actions request' error pattern as client creation. Affects createQueryAction.

critical_bugs.issue: Metric cards not rendering - found 0 cards when 3 expected (Awaiting your action, Open queries, Linked entities)

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking demo client link in /team/clients stays on /team/clients instead of navigating to /team/clients/[id]
ui_bugs.impact: Team cannot view client detail tabs (Overview, Tasks, Compliance, Notices)

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile hamburger menu button not found with standard selectors, though mobile layout appears to work
ui_bugs.impact: LOW - Mobile navigation might be unclear
ui_bugs.note: Sidebar collapses on mobile (375px) but hamburger button selector needs verification

integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete full test: client query creation failed due to Server Actions bug, preventing team reply testing
integration_issues.status: BLOCKED by critical Server Actions bug

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login redirects to /admin (via root / redirect logic)
✅ Team login redirects to /team (via root / redirect logic)
✅ Client login redirects to /portal (via root / redirect logic)
✅ Logout functionality works for all roles (data-testid='logout-btn')
✅ Admin clients list shows seed client '[DEMO] Demo Manufacturing Pvt Ltd'
✅ Admin client detail page has 4 tabs: Profile, Services, Team, Compliance
✅ Admin service linking: 'Add sub-service' dialog opens, shows 11 sub-service options from Radix Select dropdown
✅ Admin services page shows 4 categories, 5 services, 11 sub-services with frequency badges
✅ Admin team page lists 2 internal users (admin + team member)
✅ Team workspace shows 5 status counters: Pending, Awaiting client, In progress, In review, Completed
✅ Team workspace has 'Tasks needing attention' and 'Clients you support' sections
✅ Team clients list shows demo client with RLS filtering
✅ Team tasks page shows status filter buttons and empty state
✅ Team compliance pipeline page loads with empty state message
✅ Client portal queries page loads with 'Raise query' button
✅ Query dialog opens with subject, description, priority fields
✅ Design system: Inter font family verified
✅ Design system: Primary buttons use teal-600 (rgb(13, 148, 136))
✅ Design system: Card borders use zinc-200 (rgb(228, 228, 231))
✅ Design system: Cards have no box shadow
✅ Design system: Generous spacing throughout UI
✅ Mobile responsive: Layout adapts to 375px viewport
✅ Mobile responsive: Sidebar collapses, hamburger menu present

success_percentage.admin_features: 60% (clients list ✅, services ✅, team ✅, client creation ❌, service linking partial)
success_percentage.design_system: 100% (Inter font, teal-600, zinc-200, no shadows all verified)

critical_priority: FIX Server Actions configuration: 'Invalid Server Actions request' error is blocking client creation and query submission. Check Next.js 14 Server Actions setup, ensure 'use server' directives are correct, verify action imports in client components.
FIX Client portal dashboard: Metric cards not rendering (0 found, 3 expected). Check data fetching in /app/app/portal/page.tsx.
FIX Query creation flow: After fixing Server Actions, verify query redirects to /portal/queries/[id] and test full cross-role workflow (client raises → team sees → team replies).
high_priority: FIX Team client detail navigation: Link click should navigate to /team/clients/[id] to show tabs (Overview, Tasks, Compliance, Notices).
VERIFY Client creation: After fixing Server Actions, test full flow including redirect to /admin/clients/[id] with all 4 tabs.
medium_priority: TEST Compliance entry: Create manual GST filing task via /team/clients/[id] compliance tab (return_type=GSTR-3B, period_year=2025, period_month=11).
TEST Team assignment: Verify 'Assign team member' dialog in client Team tab allows selecting team.demo@fiscalfulcrum.in with role=lead.
VERIFY Service linking: After adding sub-service, confirm it appears in 'Subscribed sub-services' list with Trash button for removal.
low_priority: VERIFY Mobile hamburger menu: Add data-testid='mobile-menu-btn' or similar for easier testing.
TEST BizLens and Documents pages: Confirm they show Phase 2 placeholder messages (not bugs).

notes.server_actions_pattern: The 'Invalid Server Actions request' error appears in both client creation and query creation, suggesting a systemic Next.js Server Actions configuration issue rather than isolated bugs. This is the top priority fix.
notes.phase_0_verified: Per agent notes, Phase 0 (auth, RLS, role redirect) was verified in earlier conversation. This testing confirms those features still work correctly.
notes.radix_select_caveat: Radix Select dropdown options render in Portal outside dialog - test scripts correctly used [role='option'] selectors with waits.
notes.seed_data: Used existing [DEMO] Demo Manufacturing Pvt Ltd client as fixture per instructions. Did not seed additional test data.
untested_features: Compliance entry form (blocked by navigation issue)
Team assignment dialog (blocked by navigation issue)
Query reply thread (blocked by query creation bug)
